profile.name: SkillSpector

intro.title: SkillSpector
intro.desc: Security scanner for AI agent skills.** Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks before installing agent skills.

features: **Multi-format input**: Scan Git repos, URLs, zip files, directories, or single files
**Two-stage analysis**: Fast static analysis + optional LLM semantic evaluation
**Multiple output formats**: Terminal, JSON, Markdown, and SARIF reports
**Risk scoring**: 0-100 score with severity labels and clear recommendations

detalle.name: SkillSpector
detalle.desc: Security scanner for AI agent skills.** Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks before installing agent skills.
detalle.avoid_if: ya tienes una herramienta equivalente o no encaja con tu stack actual
